summary_en: Restar to tender 1,550,000 Shinko Shoji shares (5.12% of outstanding) to Kaga Electronics' public tender offer for complete subsidiary acquisition. Capital alliance with Shinko Shoji terminated effective today.
title_en: Notice regarding execution of subscription agreement for public tender offer for Shinko Shoji shares and termination of capital and business alliance
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Restar Corporation's board approved execution of a subscription agreement to tender its 1,550,000 shares in Shinko Shoji Company to Kaga Electronics' ongoing public tender offer. Kaga Electronics is conducting the tender to acquire complete ownership of Shinko Shoji; Shinko Shoji's board has endorsed the offer and left participation to shareholder discretion. Restar, which holds 5.12% of Shinko Shoji's outstanding shares (1,550,000 shares), determined that tendering its stake was the rational course of action given the acquisition context. Simultaneously, Restar's board approved termination of its capital and business alliance agreement with Shinko Shoji, effective immediately. The alliance had been executed on 31 October 2024. Shinko Shoji holds 550,000 shares in Restar. The disclosure notes that Kaga Electronics provided further details in its own announcement of the tender offer launch, and Shinko Shoji issued a separate statement expressing its position.
